name: Make your own rp
description:
I searched up 'Make your own rp' and only found two bots that were of characters , one had a full scenario already and the other was for Cedric Diggory or something .

So I made this for people who just can't seem to find the right roleplay or bot to chat with .

(And also for me to use over and over again)

You can ask the bot to do fandom rp's (eg.Naruto , Batman , Resident Evil ect.)

Enjoy the bot , I will most likely not be making more , but advice and criticism is appreciated !

Thanks :)
creator: Venus_Aspen
